title: scabiosa lucida var. alpestris
intro: Scabiosa lucida var. alpestris, commonly known as Alpine Pine Drop or Alpine Scabiosa, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential treatment for wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its rich content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which can help to boost the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. Scabiosa lucida var. alpestris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for various forms of use in folk medicine.
